Buy Medicines Online in New Delhi – Home Delivery & Lab Tests

Health Hub is a licensed pharmacy located at Block G, Connaught Place, New Delhi – 110001. We offer a wide range of allopathic medicines, Ayurvedic products, homeopathy remedies, vitamins & supplements, skin care, hair care, baby care products, diabetes care, surgical items, and more — all available for online ordering with home delivery.

Get free delivery above ₹499. We are open 8:00 AM – 11:45 PM, 7 days a week. Upload your prescription online and get medicines delivered to your doorstep. Book lab tests at home including CBC, thyroid, diabetes, liver function, kidney function, lipid profile, vitamin D, and more at affordable prices.

Popular Medicine Categories

  • Allopathic Medicines – Tablets, capsules, syrups, injections
  • Ayurvedic Products – Patanjali, Dabur, Himalaya, Baidyanath
  • Homeopathy – SBL, Dr. Reckeweg, Schwabe remedies
  • Generic Medicines – Affordable alternatives
  • Vitamins & Nutrition – Vitamin C, D3, B12, Omega-3
  • Diabetes Care – Glucometers, strips, supplements
  • Skin Care – Sunscreen, moisturizers, face wash
  • Hair Care – Anti-dandruff, serums, oils
  • Baby Care – Diapers, formula, baby skincare
  • Fitness & Health – Protein, energy supplements
  • Immunity Boosters – Chyawanprash, zinc, tulsi
  • Sexual Wellness – Health & hygiene products
  • Surgical Products – Bandages, gloves, masks
  • Supports & Braces – Knee caps, back belts

Lab Tests at Home – Book Online

Book lab tests from the comfort of your home. Our trained phlebotomist will collect your sample at your doorstep. Available tests include: Complete Blood Count (CBC), Thyroid Profile, HbA1c, Lipid Profile, Liver Function Test (LFT), Kidney Function Test (KFT), Vitamin D, Vitamin B12, Iron Profile, Urine Analysis, COVID-19 tests, and comprehensive health packages.

Why Choose Health Hub?

  • ✅ A new neighbourhood pharmacy in Connaught Place
  • 🚚 Free home delivery on orders above ₹499
  • 🧪 Lab tests at home – book online, get reports fast
  • 📋 Upload prescriptions and get medicines delivered
  • 💊 Wide range: Allopathic, Ayurvedic, Homeopathy, Cosmetics
